title: calamagrostis pilosa
intro: Calamagrostis pilosa, also known as wild grass or Chinese feather grass, is a type of grass native to East Asia, particularly in China and Japan, characterized by its feathery plumes and slender stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis pilosa are said to include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and promoting digestion, among others. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
